<?php /** * Validate all attributes in the tokens. */ class HTMLPurifier_Strategy_ValidateAttributes extends HTMLPurifier_Strategy { /** * @param HTMLPurifier_Token[] $tokens * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @param HTMLPurifier_Context $context * @return HTMLPurifier_Token[] */ public function execute($tokens, $config, $context) { // setup validator $validator = new HTMLPurifier_AttrValidator(); $token = false; $context->register('CurrentToken', $token); foreach ($tokens as $key => $token) { // only process tokens that have attributes, // namely start and empty tags if (!$token instanceof HTMLPurifier_Token_Start && !$token instanceof HTMLPurifier_Token_Empty) { continue; } // skip tokens that are armored if (!empty($token->armor['ValidateAttributes'])) { continue; } // note that we have no facilities here for removing tokens $validator->validateToken($token, $config, $context); } $context->destroy('CurrentToken'); return $tokens; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
